tasks.name: Fix V_t definition to match empirical behavior
tasks.description: The Lyapunov function V_t = 0.5*||w||^2 empirically increases during training (weights grow). This contradicts the paper's claim. Fix by redefining V_t = f(w_t) + mu_t*||w_t||^2 (composite Lyapunov) or using V_t = L(w_t) as the training loss which actually decreases. Update all sections referencing V_t.

tasks.name: Integrate existing VGG-16-BN data from iter_005 into paper
tasks.description: VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10 data exists from iter_005 (4/7 methods x 3 seeds). Integrate into Table 2 as multi-architecture evidence. Zero compute needed.

tasks.name: Validate Theorem 2 (cumulative alignment bound) from existing data
tasks.description: Compute cumulative alignment (bar_delta) and worst-case alignment (sup_delta) from iter_006 instrumented reruns. Calculate Spearman correlation against generalization gap. Generate scatter plot.

tasks.name: Create certified band visualization
tasks.description: Generate Figure showing the certified band [lambda_min, lambda_max] with method trajectories overlaid. Use instrumented rerun data. This is the paper's central theoretical contribution and currently has no visualization.

tasks.name: Rewrite paper addressing all P0 critic issues
tasks.description: Rewrite all paper sections incorporating: fixed V_t, VGG data, Theorem 2 validation, certified band figure. Address all 6 P0-BLOCKING and 6 P1-HIGH issues from critic findings.
